name: fs.delete
description: Delete a file relative to a repository or workspace root.

path.description: Path to the file relative to repo_root.

repo_root.description: Repository or workspace root; defaults to fixture, project, RUNX_CWD, or the current working directory.

project.description: Optional alias for repo_root used by local harnesses.

fixture.description: Optional fixture workspace root used during dev and harness execution.
